annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Neb. Rev. Stat. §45-103, currently 5.970% (in effect since July 16, 2026). Rate = bond-equivalent yield of the first 26-week U.S. Treasury bill auction of each quarter. Simple interest. Does not apply where another law fixes the rate or the action is on a contract fixing one. Verify at nebraskajudicial.gov; not legal advice.
